source_boundary: Curated customer proof index for selection and governance. This is not the full Quote Matrix. Exact quotes, review ratings, badges, rankings, and named reviewer claims require current source verification and approval before public copy use. Review-site rows may support public E-E-A-T stories only when review_story.story_allowed is true, the row has a real person or business identity, and a usable public review URL is linked in the same public paragraph as the paraphrase. Generic review themes remain VoC research only.
